sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this RPG title

special_mechanics.name: Party-Based Movement
special_mechanics.description: Turn-based RPG with party system. Player controls hero and recruited party members (max 4 in active party). Movement handled through menu-based navigation rather than real-time platforming physics.

special_mechanics.name: Day/Night Cycle
special_mechanics.description: Game features day/night cycle affecting character availability and quest accessibility, but no documented physics parameters for time-based movement changes.

special_mechanics.name: Debug Movement Bypass
special_mechanics.description: Using Game Genie code AEENSNNY in US version: holding B on controller 1 allows free movement through walls and obstacles (debug feature, disabled in Revision B).

physics_values.note: Collision detection can be disabled via cheat code

tier_notes: Tier 2: Dragon Warrior III is an RPG with turn-based mechanics and menu-driven navigation. No platforming physics, jump mechanics, gravity systems, or sub-pixel rendering documented. Movement is handled through party management and overworld navigation rather than real-time physics parameters. Sources provide game design information and debug features but no quantitative movement physics data applicable to platformer analysis.
